// PORTFOLIO

Featured Projects

Real projects. Real impact. Built for real businesses.

FULL STACK PLATFORM — 4 PANELS
LIVE PROJECT
FULL STACK PLATFORM · TAMIL NADU

TN AC Service Center — Complete Platform

Tamil Nadu-wide AC service marketplace — built end-to-end by MK Tech Solutions. Includes Customer App (booking, live tracking, payments), Technician Panel (KYC, ticket management, earnings), Admin CRM Dashboard (analytics, escalations, revenue), and AI Chat Support in Tamil & English. Inspired by Swiggy's booking UX, Urban Company's operations, and Bajaj Kapture's CRM. Handles ₹100 commission per booking with full call masking to protect technician privacy.
